name: The Fall of Velkaria
searchText: the fall of velkaria the-fall-of-velkaria timeline event velkaria collapses in a red night, reshaping the western roads and the ash gate. age of shadow, year 14, autumn ashwane 22 world changing age of shadow, year 14, autumn ashwane 22 world changing disaster age of shadow 14 autumn ashwane 22 velkaria fell in a single red night, leaving the western roads broken and its bells silent. the fall scattered noble houses, ended the river tithe, and made the ash gate a forbidden crossing. velkaria collapse history manual timeline child manual-timeline-child manual timeline child timeline
